pi_items.source: Found in export_result.sh as one of the target_folders ['.Build-Alerts', '.BuildAlerts', '.build-alerts', '.buildalerts'] and verifier.py logging.
Found in verifier.py as the exact list of keywords to check for in the email subjects, and setup_task.sh injects synthetic emails containing these words.
Found in export_result.sh checking for 'build-master@company.com' in the 'To' header of sent emails.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated emails created directly via setup_task.sh. The expected target folder 'Build-Alerts', filtering keywords ('fail', 'error', 'bug', 'problem'), escalation recipient ('build-master@company.com'), and the log file path ('/home/ga/Documents/triage_log.txt') exactly match the task scripts and verifier logic.
